approved.description: Display heading rotated -3deg overlapping a full-bleed image with clip-path reveal
approved.whyItWorked: Creates immediate visual tension and breaks the 'centered heading' pattern. Strong composition signal.

approved.description: Nav items that shift color/weight based on scroll section, with magnetic hover on CTA
approved.whyItWorked: Makes nav feel alive without being distracting. Good craft dimension score.

approved.description: Bento grid with cards entering via ScrollTrigger.batch(), alternating from left/right with depth shadows
approved.whyItWorked: Reliable high-scorer. Combines stagger + depth + asymmetric grid for 3 excellence dimensions at once.

approved.description: Footer with 3 parallax layers (bg texture, content, floating accent) collapsing on scroll end
approved.whyItWorked: Distinctive close to page. Most footers are flat -- this adds depth as a signature.

approved.description: Oversized 'COQUE' at 22vw behind gradient mesh, 3-plane parallax (30%/15%/8%), front-content bottom-left
approved.whyItWorked: Back-type as spatial anchor creates depth without imagery. Avoids the dark-image-on-dark trap.

approved.description: Each project reveals left-to-right via clip-path: inset() at 1000ms power3.inOut on light theme
approved.whyItWorked: Slow curtain-pull makes each project feel like an event. Light section provides breathing room.
approved.ruleNote: Pre-RULE-007 (600ms cap). 1000ms intentional for portfolio slow-reveal context.

approved.description: Two rows at different speeds (60px/s vs 45px/s) in opposite directions, pause on hover
approved.whyItWorked: Speed differential prevents mechanical feel. Display + mono rows add typographic contrast.

approved.description: Headline words push away from cursor while CTA button pulls toward it (magnetic + repulsion)
approved.whyItWorked: Gravitational tension creates micro-narrative -- everything points toward the action button.

rejected.feedback: Full-viewport looping video behind hero text
rejected.lesson: Performance hit, accessibility concerns, feels like 2018. Use static image with motion overlays instead.

rejected.feedback: Horizontally scrolling ticker with brand logos
rejected.lesson: Feels cheap and distracting. Only works for testimonial quotes with careful pacing.

_meta.cleanReason: Audit V1: removed 33 all-null shell entries (17 reference stubs + 16 practice stubs with no element/description/whyItWorked). Only real signatures with actual content retained. 41 -> 8 approved entries.
